sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51998" key="kainotomhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καινο-τομητέον</orth>, <sense id="n51998.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must be an innovator</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:8:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
